name: TODO Backend Generator
description: Generates a NestJS + SQL.js CRUD backend for the TODO app

checks.fail: ❌ todo-app/packages/backend/ missing — run scaffold lane first

checks.prompt:
You are generating a complete NestJS 10 + SQL.js backend for a TODO CRUD app.

Requirements:
- SQL.js (npm: sql.js) for in-memory SQLite — no external DB process needed
- Full CRUD: Create, Read, ReadAll, Update, Delete for Todo items
- Todo entity: id (integer PK autoincrement), title (text, not null), completed (boolean, default 0), createdAt (text ISO timestamp)
- REST endpoints under /api/todos:
  GET    /api/todos          → list all
  GET    /api/todos/:id      → get one
  POST   /api/todos          → create
  PATCH  /api/todos/:id      → update title/completed
  DELETE /api/todos/:id      → delete
- Global prefix: 'api'
- CORS enabled for http://localhost:3000
- Port: 3001

Write ALL the following files using write_file:

`todo-app/packages/backend/src/main.ts`
  — Bootstrap NestJS, setGlobalPrefix('api'), enableCors, listen(3001)

`todo-app/packages/backend/src/app.module.ts`
  — AppModule importing TodosModule and DatabaseModule

`todo-app/packages/backend/src/database/database.module.ts`
  — DatabaseModule providing SQL_JS token via factory: loads sql.js wasm-less variant, creates 'todos' table if not exists

`todo-app/packages/backend/src/database/database.tokens.ts`
  — export const SQL_JS = 'SQL_JS' injection token

`todo-app/packages/backend/src/todos/todo.entity.ts`
  — TodoEntity class with id, title, completed (boolean), createdAt (string)

`todo-app/packages/backend/src/todos/dto/create-todo.dto.ts`
  — CreateTodoDto: title (string, required)

`todo-app/packages/backend/src/todos/dto/update-todo.dto.ts`
  — UpdateTodoDto: PartialType(CreateTodoDto) + completed?: boolean

`todo-app/packages/backend/src/todos/todos.service.ts`
  — TodosService injecting SQL_JS Database instance
  — findAll(): TodoEntity[]
  — findOne(id): TodoEntity | undefined
  — create(dto): TodoEntity
  — update(id, dto): TodoEntity
  — remove(id): void
  — All methods use parameterized SQL queries (never string interpolation)

`todo-app/packages/backend/src/todos/todos.controller.ts`
  — TodosController with @Controller('todos') and full CRUD route handlers
  — Throws NotFoundException for missing records

`todo-app/packages/backend/src/todos/todos.module.ts`
  — TodosModule importing DatabaseModule, providing and exporting TodosService, declaring TodosController

Security requirements:
- ALL SQL queries MUST use parameterized statements (db.prepare + run/get/all with bound parameters)
- NEVER concatenate user input into SQL strings
- Input validation: title must be a non-empty string

Do NOT write placeholder comments. Write complete, compilable TypeScript.

checks.pass: ✅ No raw SQL interpolation detected in service
checks.fail: ⚠️  Possible SQL injection risk: found string concatenation near SQL queries
failRecommendations: Replace all SQL string concatenation with db.prepare() bound parameters
Never interpolate user input directly into SQL strings
